TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ci-lu-se eseŚĪÖť≠ĮŚ£ęšļĆšłĖ == Ci-lu-se ese, baluhay maluman a sisiw nu sumamaday, ayda ni sumadan tu cudadan u Say-lu-se. cinida u Pu-se-ti-kuo patidengay misulitay a tademaw, A-ci-mei-ni-de-wancaw, sayaway a kuowan. cinida henay ku mikuwanay, ti-kuo haminen nida ku nuaydaay a hamin nu kapahay a kanatalan, pasu tunnaya, atu cun-ya atu kaw-cia-suo ni kitidaan. u kanatal nida namaka nutipan a He-le-se-pan katukuh walian a Ing-tu sawacan, sa tabakiay nu tikuoan. u ngngan nida han u tati, Pu-se kuowan, An-san-kuowan, Mi-di-kuowan, Pa-pi-lun-kuowan, Su-mei-e atu A-ka-de-kuowan, Se-hu kuowan. cinida malakuuyd nida ku nipihapuni Ci-lu-se sakay likisi a tadanakamuan nida. 92 Ci-lu-se tati mikuwan a demiadan kya itida i tusiw katukuh tu lucay mihcaan. sayaway nida madebungay u Mi-di wankuo, kilul sa u Liu-di-ya wankuo, kakilukilusa u Sin-pa-pi-lun wankuo. nidebungan tu Pa-pi-lun nikuda, mililid ci nida katukuh tu Cun-ya a midebung, madayum debungan, "nai' ku miwawiesay a kanatal debungan". ci Ci-lu-se nai' ku lemed micumud i Ay-ci, dayhan ci nida i kunyun nu ayawan limlusep mihcaan caytu bulad mapatay i sawac nu Si-e-he milepacaw tu Ma-sa-ke-tay a nikalpacawan. wawa nida ci Kan-pi-si-se ese kina miduducay tu kawaw nida, tu nikaapuyuan nida a mikuwan madebung nida ku Ay-ci, Nu-pi-ya atu Si-lan-ni-cia. 100 192 hidan u tademaw nu udip a sasakamuen, ci Ci-lu-se ese u Pu-se niyadu'ay nu tahudan tu mililiday ci Kan-pi-si-se yise a wawa, u baki ci Ci-lu-se yise. uheni nu dayday a binacadan idaw ku Ay-lan walian atu Pa'-sa nu kitidaan, sakakaay nu heni pangangan han ci An-say-wan. kunyun limlimwal mihcaan mililid tu Puo-se-niyadu' linmum, patideng tu Pa'-say-puo-li-se, tawya Pu-se u Mi-ti wankuo a mikapiay. nu ayawan tu kunyun limlimsep mihcaan, ci Ci-lu-se debungan nida ku baki ci Se-ti-a-ke-se nikuwanan a Mi-ti-wankuo, malingatu micukaymas tu " Mi-ti-cu-kuo-kuo-wan" a ngangan. sa madebung ku Pa-ti-ya. . nu ayawan tu limsiwnem mihcaan debungan ku Li-ti-ya atu Siw-ya-si-ya a Si-la nu niyadu'an. kunyun nu ayawan limsiplim mihcaan katukuh tu limlusiw nu ayawan a mihcaan, makakilul midebung tu De-lan-ci-ya-na, Ma-e-ci-an-na, Hua-ci-ce-muo, Li-te', Pa-ke'-te-li-ya, A-li-ya, Ke-duo-lu-si-ya, Sa-ta-ci-di-ya, A-la-ke-si-ya, Cin-tuo-luo tu kitidaan, u Se-ci-tay nu tademaw mahaneng tu. ŚČć546 .45 383 kunyun nu ayawan limlusiw mihcaan, ci Ci-lu-se mililid tu Puo-se nu hitayan midebung tu Pa-pi-lun, sa debungan ku Sin-pa-pi-lun wankuo. tawya ci Ci-lu-se a misaahebal makatukuh tu tungduh, ci Pa-pi-lun makatimul katukuh tu Ay-ci nu lilisan a yadahay nu kanatalan, pasayda tu namin i Pu-se-tademaw. ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉŚČć539ŚĻī, . Ci-lu-se tati lunem, nika inai' t uku kidu ci Ci-lu-se tati nu inai'ay a tati kuo, Pa-pi-lun u tataydaan nida a sakacacay, manamuh ci nida tu "Pa-pi-lun cewan, Su-mei-e atu A-ka-de cewan", ci nida misadamsay tu nipidebungan nida a kanatalan, atu nu ayawan a Cea-le-ti-wankuo a nikuwanay nu kapahay a sasasetsetan, sisa nipikuwan ni Puo-se tawya, ci Si-ya masahida tu ku sasungaay, lalangawan atu nalimaan mahida tu mapacakat. . mapatayś≠Ľšļ° ci Ci-lu-se i nu ayawan tu limtutu mihcaan mapatay, yadah ku kamu tu nikapatay nida, idaw ku sananay musakamu tu ci Ci-lu-se pidebungan tu Cun-ya a pahutinay tu katalan nu niyadu'an ci Ma-sa-tay tademaw, nipikedaan mipatay tu sakakaay ci Se-pa-e-cie-pi-si-se wance, caay ka hademhem ku wina ci Mi-li-se tu lalum, kaisa mikuhang ci Puo-se, pacici mililid mihantay tu wawanida a paculi, mamin ku hitay nu Puo-se mapatay, pasu ci Ci-li-se tinani kalepacawan a mapatay sa. matepa ni Ma-sey-ke-tay niwan ku kidu ni Ci-li-se, litabadan nida ku tanganh, pacumuden nida i tanuidang sananay a tulangkuan. mapahedektu ku nakamuan nida, papingaayen ci Ci-lu-se " pakabeculen tui dang". ". sisa, wawanida ci Kan-pi-si-se ese demicen nida ku Ma-sa-ke-tay tademaw patayen nida ci Mi-li-se, patayda han ci Ci-li-se mitadem i Pa-sa-e-cia-de. duma a nakamuan ci Ci-li-se itida i suodu Pa-sa-e-cia-de mapatay. idaw ku lunem ni Ci-li-se tu daylisikian i Pa-sa-e-cia-de. Ka-san-te-li-ya a A-li-se-tuo-pu-lu-se namiawaw ci Ya-li-san-tati kinatusa tayni mididaw tu lunem. Pa-te-la-puo atu A-li-an i cudadan nida sakamusa ci A-li-se-tuo-pu-lu-se a nikaadihan tu sasakamuen tina lineman. ÁĄ∂ŤÄĆ, . sisiway a Ci-li-seŤĀĖÁ∂ďšł≠ÁöĄŚĪÖť≠ĮŚ£ę saan ku sisiw, ci Ci-lu-se ese mihapu misangan tu Pa-pi-lun,Ya-su', Ay-lan atu Yu-tay tademaw a miyu, mihang tu dayday nu Pa-pi-lun kuowan pacici malimad tayda i Mei-suo-pu-ta-mi-ya a tademaw taluma tu kanatal a lumaan. " patahekal tu mapululay nu Pa-pi-lun a tademaw" ninakawaw alaw namaminay tu sulitan i Yu-tay-zen a sisiwan nu sasakamuen, itini i sisiw tu Yi-say-ya cudad u kapahay sa. nina sisiwan a kawawan, ci Ci-li-se ese saidaway a sisiwan a wawayan itini i sumamad nu wali nutipan a cudad atu likisi nisulitan nu cudadan caay ka bulic ku nakaydaan. "ŤĀĖÁ∂ď"šł≠śŹźŚąį, .

tad…ômaw, a- ¶i-m…ôi-ni-d…ô-wan ¶aw, sajawaj a kuowan. ¶inida ńß…ônaj ku mikuwanaj, ti-kuo ńßamin…ôn nida ku nuajdaaj a ńßamin nu kapańßaj a kanatar~…ĺan, pasu tunnaja, atu ¶un-ja atu kaw- ¶ia-suo ni kitidaan. u kanatar~…ĺ nida namaka nutipan a ńß…ô-r~…ĺ…ô-s…ô-pan katukuńß war~…ĺian a iŇč-tu sawa ¶an, sa tabakiaj nu tikuoan. u ŇčŇčan nida ńßan u tati, pu-s…ô kuowan, an-san-kuowan, mi-di-kuowan, pa-pi-r~…ĺun-kuowan, su-m…ôi-…ô atu a-ka-d…ô-kuowan, s…ô-ńßu kuowan. ¶inida mar~…ĺakuujd nida ku nipińßapuni ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô sakaj r~…ĺikisi a tadanakamuan nida. ** ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô tati mikuwan a d…ômiadan kja itida i tusiw katukuńß tu r~…ĺu ¶aj mińß ¶aan. sajawaj nida mad…ôbuŇčaj u mi-di wankuo, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa u r~…ĺiu-di-ja wankuo, kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺusa u sin-pa-pi-r~…ĺun wankuo. nid…ôbuŇčan tu pa-pi-r~…ĺun nikuda, mir~…ĺir~…ĺid ¶i nida katukuńß tu ¶un-ja a mid…ôbuŇč, madajum d…ôbuŇčan, "nai Ē~ ° ku miwawi…ôsaj a kanatar~…ĺ d…ôbuŇčan". ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô nai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺ…ôm…ôd mi ¶umud i aj- ¶i, dajńßan ¶i nida i kunjun nu ajawan r~…ĺimr~…ĺus…ôp mińß ¶aan ¶ajtu bur~…ĺad mapataj i sawa ¶ nu si-…ô-ńß…ô mir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw tu ma-sa-k…ô-taj a nikar~…ĺpa ¶awan. wawa nida ¶i kan-pi-si-s…ô …ôs…ô kina midudu ¶aj tu kawaw nida, tu nikaapujuan nida a mikuwan mad…ôbuŇč nida ku aj- ¶i, nu-pi-ja atu si-r~…ĺan-ni- ¶ia. *** *** ńßidan u tad…ômaw nu udip a sasakamu…ôn, ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô …ôs…ô u pu-s…ô nijadu Ē~ °aj nu tańßudan tu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj ¶i kan-pi-si-s…ô jis…ô a wawa, u baki ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô jis…ô. uńß…ôni nu dajdaj a bina ¶adan idaw ku aj-r~…ĺan war~…ĺian atu pa Ē~ °-sa nu kitidaan, sakakaaj nu ńß…ôni paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i an-saj-wan. kunjun r~…ĺimr~…ĺimwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu puo-s…ô-nijadu Ē~ ° r~…ĺinmum, patid…ôŇč tu pa Ē~ °-saj-puo-r~…ĺi-s…ô, tawja pu-s…ô u mi-ti wankuo a mikapiaj. nu ajawan tu kunjun r~…ĺimr~…ĺims…ôp mińß ¶aan, ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô d…ôbuŇčan nida ku baki ¶i s…ô-ti-a-k…ô-s…ô nikuwanan a mi-ti-wankuo, mar~…ĺiŇčatu mi ¶ukajmas tu " mi-ti- ¶u-kuo-kuo-wan" a ŇčaŇčan. sa mad…ôbuŇč ku pa-ti-ja. . nu ajawan tu r~…ĺimsiwn…ôm mińß ¶aan d…ôbuŇčan ku r~…ĺi-ti-ja atu siw-ja-si-ja a si-r~…ĺa nu nijadu Ē~ °an. kunjun nu ajawan r~…ĺimsipr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu r~…ĺimr~…ĺusiw nu ajawan a mińß ¶aan, makakir~…ĺur~…ĺ mid…ôbuŇč tu d…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶i-ja-na, ma-…ô- ¶i-an-na, ńßua- ¶i- ¶…ô-muo, r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ °, pa-k…ô Ē~ °-t…ô-r~…ĺi-ja, a-r~…ĺi-ja, k…ô-duo-r~…ĺu-si-ja, sa-ta- ¶i-di-ja, a-r~…ĺa-k…ô-si-ja, ¶in-tuo-r~…ĺuo tu kitidaan, u s…ô- ¶i-taj nu tad…ômaw mańßan…ôŇč tu. **** .** *** kunjun nu ajawan r~…ĺimr~…ĺusiw mińß ¶aan, ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu puo-s…ô nu ńßitajan mid…ôbuŇč tu pa-pi-r~…ĺun, sa d…ôbuŇčan ku sin-pa-pi-r~…ĺun wankuo. tawja ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô a misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ makatukuńß tu tuŇčduńß, ¶i pa-pi-r~…ĺun makatimur~…ĺ katukuńß tu aj- ¶i nu r~…ĺir~…ĺisan a jadańßaj nu kanatar~…ĺan, pasajda tu namin i pu-s…ô-tad…ômaw. *******, . ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô tati r~…ĺun…ôm, nika inai Ē~ ° t uku kidu ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô tati nu inai Ē~ °aj a tati kuo, pa-pi-r~…ĺun u tatajdaan nida a saka ¶a ¶aj, manamuńß ¶i nida tu "pa-pi-r~…ĺun ¶…ôwan, su-m…ôi-…ô atu a-ka-d…ô ¶…ôwan", ¶i nida misadamsaj tu nipid…ôbuŇčan nida a kanatar~…ĺan, atu nu ajawan a ¶…ôa-r~…ĺ…ô-ti-wankuo a nikuwanaj nu kapańßaj a sasas…ôts…ôtan, sisa nipikuwan ni puo-s…ô tawja, ¶i si-ja masańßida tu ku sasuŇčaaj, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu nar~…ĺimaan mańßida tu mapa ¶akat. . mapataj** ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô i nu ajawan tu r~…ĺimtutu mińß ¶aan mapataj, jadańß ku kamu tu nikapataj nida, idaw ku sananaj musakamu tu ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô pid…ôbuŇčan tu ¶un-ja a pańßutinaj tu katar~…ĺan nu nijadu Ē~ °an ¶i ma-sa-taj tad…ômaw, nipik…ôdaan mipataj tu sakakaaj ¶i s…ô-pa-…ô- ¶i…ô-pi-si-s…ô wan ¶…ô, ¶aaj ka ńßad…ômńß…ôm ku wina ¶i mi-r~…ĺi-s…ô tu r~…ĺar~…ĺum, kaisa mikuńßaŇč ¶i puo-s…ô, pa ¶i ¶i mir~…ĺir~…ĺid mińßantaj tu wawanida a pa ¶ur~…ĺi, mamin ku ńßitaj nu puo-s…ô mapataj, pasu ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺi-s…ô tinani kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a mapataj sa. mat…ôpa ni ma-s…ô-k…ô-taj niwan ku kidu ni ¶i-r~…ĺi-s…ô, r~…ĺitabadan nida ku taŇčanńß, pa ¶umud…ôn nida i tanuidaŇč sananaj a tur~…ĺaŇčkuan. mapańß…ôd…ôktu ku nakamuan nida, papiŇčaaj…ôn ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô " pakab…ô ¶ur~…ĺ…ôn tui daŇč". ". sisa, wawanida ¶i kan-pi-si-s…ô …ôs…ô d…ômi ¶…ôn nida ku ma-sa-k…ô-taj tad…ômaw pataj…ôn nida ¶i mi-r~…ĺi-s…ô, patajda ńßan ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺi-s…ô mitad…ôm i pa-sa-…ô- ¶ia-d…ô. duma a nakamuan ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺi-s…ô itida i suodu pa-sa-…ô- ¶ia-d…ô mapataj. idaw ku r~…ĺun…ôm ni ¶i-r~…ĺi-s…ô tu dajr~…ĺisikian i pa-sa-…ô- ¶ia-d…ô. ka-san-t…ô-r~…ĺi-ja a a-r~…ĺi-s…ô-tuo-pu-r~…ĺu-s…ô namiawaw ¶i ja-r~…ĺi-san-tati kinatusa tajni mididaw tu r~…ĺun…ôm. pa-t…ô-r~…ĺa-puo atu a-r~…ĺi-an i ¶udadan nida sakamusa ¶i a-r~…ĺi-s…ô-tuo-pu-r~…ĺu-s…ô a nikaadińßan tu sasakamu…ôn tina r~…ĺin…ôman. **, . sisiwaj a ¶i-r~…ĺi-s…ô******* saan ku sisiw, ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺu-s…ô …ôs…ô mińßapu misaŇčan tu pa-pi-r~…ĺun,ja-su Ē~ °, aj-r~…ĺan atu ju-taj tad…ômaw a miju, mińßaŇč tu dajdaj nu pa-pi-r~…ĺun kuowan pa ¶i ¶i mar~…ĺimad tajda i m…ôi-suo-pu-ta-mi-ja a tad…ômaw tar~…ĺuma tu kanatar~…ĺ a r~…ĺumaan. " patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu mapur~…ĺur~…ĺaj nu pa-pi-r~…ĺun a tad…ômaw" ninakawaw ar~…ĺaw namaminaj tu sur~…ĺitan i ju-taj-z…ôn a sisiwan nu sasakamu…ôn, itini i sisiw tu ji-saj-ja ¶udad u kapańßaj sa. nina sisiwan a kawawan, ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺi-s…ô …ôs…ô saidawaj a sisiwan a wawajan itini i sumamad nu war~…ĺi nutipan a ¶udad atu r~…ĺikisi nisur~…ĺitan nu ¶udadan ¶aaj ka bur~…ĺi ¶ ku nakajdaan. "**"***, .
S.FORM: == Ci-lu-se eseŚĪÖť≠ĮŚ£ęšļĆšłĖ == Ci-lu-se ese, baluhay maluman a sisiw nu sumamaday, ayda ni sumadan tu cudadan u Say-lu-se. cinida u Pu-se-ti-kuo patidengay misulitay a tademaw, A-ci-mei-ni-de-wancaw, sayaway a kuowan. cinida henay ku mikuwanay, ti-kuo haminen nida ku nuaydaay a hamin nu kapahay a kanatalan, pasu tunnaya, atu cun-ya atu kaw-cia-suo ni kitidaan. u kanatal nida namaka nutipan a He-le-se-pan katukuh walian a Ing-tu sawacan, sa tabakiay nu tikuoan. u ngngan nida han u tati, Pu-se kuowan, An-san-kuowan, Mi-di-kuowan, Pa-pi-lun-kuowan, Su-mei-e atu A-ka-de-kuowan, Se-hu kuowan. cinida malakuuyd nida ku nipihapuni Ci-lu-se sakay likisi a tadanakamuan nida. 92 Ci-lu-se tati mikuwan a demiadan kya itida i tusiw katukuh tu lucay mihcaan. sayaway nida madebungay u Mi-di wankuo, kilul sa u Liu-di-ya wankuo, kakilukilusa u Sin-pa-pi-lun wankuo. nidebungan tu Pa-pi-lun nikuda, mililid ci nida katukuh tu Cun-ya a midebung, madayum debungan, "nai' ku miwawiesay a kanatal debungan". ci Ci-lu-se nai' ku lemed micumud i Ay-ci, dayhan ci nida i kunyun nu ayawan limlusep mihcaan caytu bulad mapatay i sawac nu Si-e-he milepacaw tu Ma-sa-ke-tay a nikalpacawan. wawa nida ci Kan-pi-si-se ese kina miduducay tu kawaw nida, tu nikaapuyuan nida a mikuwan madebung nida ku Ay-ci, Nu-pi-ya atu Si-lan-ni-cia. 100 192 hidan u tademaw nu udip a sasakamuen, ci Ci-lu-se ese u Pu-se niyadu'ay nu tahudan tu mililiday ci Kan-pi-si-se yise a wawa, u baki ci Ci-lu-se yise. uheni nu dayday a binacadan idaw ku Ay-lan walian atu Pa'-sa nu kitidaan, sakakaay nu heni pangangan han ci An-say-wan. kunyun limlimwal mihcaan mililid tu Puo-se-niyadu' linmum, patideng tu Pa'-say-puo-li-se, tawya Pu-se u Mi-ti wankuo a mikapiay. nu ayawan tu kunyun limlimsep mihcaan, ci Ci-lu-se debungan nida ku baki ci Se-ti-a-ke-se nikuwanan a Mi-ti-wankuo, malingatu micukaymas tu " Mi-ti-cu-kuo-kuo-wan" a ngangan. sa madebung ku Pa-ti-ya. . nu ayawan tu limsiwnem mihcaan debungan ku Li-ti-ya atu Siw-ya-si-ya a Si-la nu niyadu'an. kunyun nu ayawan limsiplim mihcaan katukuh tu limlusiw nu ayawan a mihcaan, makakilul midebung tu De-lan-ci-ya-na, Ma-e-ci-an-na, Hua-ci-ce-muo, Li-te', Pa-ke'-te-li-ya, A-li-ya, Ke-duo-lu-si-ya, Sa-ta-ci-di-ya, A-la-ke-si-ya, Cin-tuo-luo tu kitidaan, u Se-ci-tay nu tademaw mahaneng tu. ŚČć546 .45 383 kunyun nu ayawan limlusiw mihcaan, ci Ci-lu-se mililid tu Puo-se nu hitayan midebung tu Pa-pi-lun, sa debungan ku Sin-pa-pi-lun wankuo. tawya ci Ci-lu-se a misaahebal makatukuh tu tungduh, ci Pa-pi-lun makatimul katukuh tu Ay-ci nu lilisan a yadahay nu kanatalan, pasayda tu namin i Pu-se-tademaw. ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉŚČć539ŚĻī, . Ci-lu-se tati lunem, nika inai' t uku kidu ci Ci-lu-se tati nu inai'ay a tati kuo, Pa-pi-lun u tataydaan nida a sakacacay, manamuh ci nida tu "Pa-pi-lun cewan, Su-mei-e atu A-ka-de cewan", ci nida misadamsay tu nipidebungan nida a kanatalan, atu nu ayawan a Cea-le-ti-wankuo a nikuwanay nu kapahay a sasasetsetan, sisa nipikuwan ni Puo-se tawya, ci Si-ya masahida tu ku sasungaay, lalangawan atu nalimaan mahida tu mapacakat. . mapatayś≠Ľšļ° ci Ci-lu-se i nu ayawan tu limtutu mihcaan mapatay, yadah ku kamu tu nikapatay nida, idaw ku sananay musakamu tu ci Ci-lu-se pidebungan tu Cun-ya a pahutinay tu katalan nu niyadu'an ci Ma-sa-tay tademaw, nipikedaan mipatay tu sakakaay ci Se-pa-e-cie-pi-si-se wance, caay ka hademhem ku wina ci Mi-li-se tu lalum, kaisa mikuhang ci Puo-se, pacici mililid mihantay tu wawanida a paculi, mamin ku hitay nu Puo-se mapatay, pasu ci Ci-li-se tinani kalepacawan a mapatay sa. matepa ni Ma-sey-ke-tay niwan ku kidu ni Ci-li-se, litabadan nida ku tanganh, pacumuden nida i tanuidang sananay a tulangkuan. mapahedektu ku nakamuan nida, papingaayen ci Ci-lu-se " pakabeculen tui dang". ". sisa, wawanida ci Kan-pi-si-se ese demicen nida ku Ma-sa-ke-tay tademaw patayen nida ci Mi-li-se, patayda han ci Ci-li-se mitadem i Pa-sa-e-cia-de. duma a nakamuan ci Ci-li-se itida i suodu Pa-sa-e-cia-de mapatay. idaw ku lunem ni Ci-li-se tu daylisikian i Pa-sa-e-cia-de. Ka-san-te-li-ya a A-li-se-tuo-pu-lu-se namiawaw ci Ya-li-san-tati kinatusa tayni mididaw tu lunem. Pa-te-la-puo atu A-li-an i cudadan nida sakamusa ci A-li-se-tuo-pu-lu-se a nikaadihan tu sasakamuen tina lineman. ÁĄ∂ŤÄĆ, . sisiway a Ci-li-seŤĀĖÁ∂ďšł≠ÁöĄŚĪÖť≠ĮŚ£ę saan ku sisiw, ci Ci-lu-se ese mihapu misangan tu Pa-pi-lun,Ya-su', Ay-lan atu Yu-tay tademaw a miyu, mihang tu dayday nu Pa-pi-lun kuowan pacici malimad tayda i Mei-suo-pu-ta-mi-ya a tademaw taluma tu kanatal a lumaan. " patahekal tu mapululay nu Pa-pi-lun a tademaw" ninakawaw alaw namaminay tu sulitan i Yu-tay-zen a sisiwan nu sasakamuen, itini i sisiw tu Yi-say-ya cudad u kapahay sa. nina sisiwan a kawawan, ci Ci-li-se ese saidaway a sisiwan a wawayan itini i sumamad nu wali nutipan a cudad atu likisi nisulitan nu cudadan caay ka bulic ku nakaydaan. "ŤĀĖÁ∂ď"šł≠śŹźŚąį, .
